title: Grilled Aubergine Stir Fry
description: A quick and easy stir fry recipe featuring grilled aubergine, served with a variety of vegetables.
instructions: Grill the aubergine for 5 minutes per side, or until tender.
Heat the olive oil in a pan over medium heat.
Add the ginger and garlic and stir-fry for 1 minute.
Add the bamboo shoots and green beans and stir-fry for 3 minutes.
Slice the grilled aubergine into strips and add to the pan.
Stir in the soy sauce and sesame seeds.
Serve immediately and garnish with additional sesame seeds if desired.
